name: Chicken Satay
recipeIngredient: 450 g chicken breasts, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 2.5 cm chunks and thread an equal number onto 15 bamboo skewers. Set aside.
2. In a large saucepan or skillet, combine sambal oelek, grated gingerroot, lemon juice, dark soy sauce, honey, peanut butter, and water. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, then reduce heat and add as many chicken skewers as will fit without crowding. Simmer for 10 minutes, basting the skewers occasionally. Remove from the pan and transfer to a rimmed platter. Repeat with remaining skewers.
3. Allow the sauce to simmer in the pan until it reduces to about 170 ml. Pour over the chicken, covering each skewer. Cover and refrigerate until cold. Serve chilled. For garnish, if desired, top with cherries and chopped Italian parsley.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: measure ingredients
